mapper.select:
select c.campaign_Id, place_addr, campaign_title, DATE_FORMAT(c.created_at, '%Y.%m.%d') created_at, event_Period_str, event_Period_end, type_code, applicants_Num, recruitment_Num, time_segment, u.user_nm from campaign c left outer join user u on c.leader_code = u.id where
(campaign_title like CONCAT('%', #{option.keyword}, '%') or place_addr like CONCAT('%', #{option.keyword}, '%'))
campaign_title like CONCAT('%', #{option.keyword}, '%')
place_addr like CONCAT('%', #{option.keyword}, '%')
tl.user_nm LIKE CONCAT('%', #{option.keyword}, '%')
and c.is_deleted = 'N'
order by campaign_Id desc
order by campaign_title asc, campaign_id desc

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM campaign c WHERE is_deleted = 'N'
AND ( campaign_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{option.keyword}, '%') OR status_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{option.keyword}, '%') OR leader_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{option.keyword}, '%') )
AND campaign_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{option.keyword}, '%')
AND status_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{option.keyword}, '%')
AND leader_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{option.keyword}, '%')
SELECT id, user_id, user_nm, phone_num FROM user WHERE role = 'LEADER';
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO campaign ( company_nm, company_ph, campaign_title, leader_Code, type_code, status_code, recruitment_num, applicants_Num, leader_pay, campaign_pay, time_segment, work_hour, wage_chk, leader_point, place_addr, mission, App_period_str, App_period_end, event_Period_str, event_Period_end, result_date ) VALUES ( #{companyNm}, #{companyPh}, #{campaignTitle}, #{leaderNo}, #{typeCode}, '4', #{recruitmentNum}, CASE WHEN #{leaderPay} != 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, #{leaderPay}, #{campaignPay}, #{timeSegment}, #{workHour}, #{wageChk}, #{leaderPoint}, #{placeAddr}, #{mission}, #{appPeriodStr}, #{appPeriodEnd}, #{eventPeriodStr}, #{eventPeriodEnd}, #{resultDate} );
mapper.select:
SELECT c.campaign_id, c.company_nm, c.company_ph, c.campaign_title, c.leader_code, c.type_code, c.status_code, c.recruitment_num, c.applicants_num, c.leader_Pay, c.campaign_pay, c.time_segment, c.place_addr, leader_point, work_hour, WAGE_CHK, DATE_FORMAT(c.App_period_str,'%Y-%m-%d') AS App_period_str, DATE_FORMAT(c.App_period_end,'%Y-%m-%d') AS App_period_end, DATE_FORMAT(c.event_Period_str,'%Y-%m-%d') AS event_Period_str, DATE_FORMAT(c.event_Period_end,'%Y-%m-%d') AS event_Period_end, DATE_FORMAT(c.result_date,'%Y-%m-%d') AS result_date, c.mission, u.User_nm as leader_Name, u.phone_num as leader_Phone, u.id as leader_No, cc.code_name FROM campaign c LEFT OUTER JOIN user u on c.leader_Code = u.id left outer join common_codes cc on cc.code_group = 'campaignType' and c.type_code = cc.code WHERE c.campaign_id = #{id}
AND c.is_deleted = 'N'
mapper.update: update campaign set company_nm = #{companyNm}, company_ph = #{companyPh}, campaign_title = #{campaignTitle}, leader_Code = #{leaderNo}, type_code = #{typeCode}, status_code = #{statusCode}, recruitment_num = #{recruitmentNum}, leader_pay = #{leaderPay}, campaign_pay = #{campaignPay}, time_segment = #{timeSegment}, work_hour = #{workHour}, wage_chk = #{wageChk}, place_addr = #{placeAddr}, mission = #{mission}, is_active = 'Y', App_period_str = #{appPeriodStr}, App_period_end = #{appPeriodEnd}, event_Period_str = #{eventPeriodStr}, event_Period_end = #{eventPeriodEnd}, result_date = #{resultDate}, leader_point = #{leaderPoint}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP where campaign_id = #{campaignId};
UPDATE user_campaign SET user_no = #{leaderNo}, user_id = #{leaderId} -- 새로운 인솔자 ID로 덮어쓰기 WHERE campaign_id = #{campaignId} AND user_no = #{oldLeaderNo} AND is_leader = 'Y' AND is_deleted = 'N'
UPDATE campaign SET is_deleted = #{isDeleted}, is_active = #{isActive} WHERE campaign_id = #{campaignId}

UPDATE user_campaign SET is_deleted = 'Y' WHERE campaign_id = #{campaignId} AND is_deleted = 'N' AND is_leader = 'N' AND user_id IN ( -- 🔥 늦게 신청한 유저들의 ID만 쏙 골라내기 SELECT t.user_id FROM ( SELECT user_id FROM user_campaign WHERE campaign_id = #{campaignId} AND is_deleted = 'N' AND is_leader = 'N' GROUP BY user_id -- 유저별로 그룹을 묶어서 (인당 1개씩만 나오게) ORDER BY MAX(created_at) DESC -- 가장 최근(늦게) 신청한 사람 순서대로! LIMIT #{exceedCount} -- 💡 자바에서 넘어온 '초과된 사람 수'만큼 커트 ) t )
mapper.select: select uc.is_leader, uc.user_id, uc.user_no, c.recruitment_num, c.applicants_num, uc.event_str_date, uc.event_end_date, c.EVENT_PERIOD_STR, c.EVENT_PERIOD_END, uc.applied_str_date, uc.applied_end_date from campaign c LEFT OUTER JOIN user_campaign uc ON c.campaign_id = uc.campaign_id and uc.is_deleted = 'N' where c.campaign_id = #{campaignId} Limit 1
mapper.update: update campaign set is_deleted = 'Y', updated_at = NOW() where campaign_id = #{id}
update user_campaign set is_deleted = 'Y', status = '0', apply_date = NULL, updated_at = NOW() where campaign_id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select c.campaign_Id, place_addr, campaign_title, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y.%m.%d') created_at, applicants_Num, recruitment_Num from campaign c where
(campaign_title like CONCAT('%', #{option.keyword}, '%') or status_code like CONCAT('%', #{option.keyword}, '%') or leader_code like CONCAT('%', #{option.keyword}, '%'))
campaign_title like CONCAT('%', #{option.keyword}, '%')
status_name like CONCAT('%', #{option.keyword}, '%')
leader_code like CONCAT('%', #{option.keyword}, '%')
and is_deleted = 'N' and applicants_num = 0
order by campaign_Id desc
order by campaign_title asc, id desc
mapper.update: UPDATE campaign SET is_active = 'N', updated_at = NOW() WHERE result_date < CURDATE() AND is_active = 'Y'
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO user_campaign( campaign_id, user_No, user_id, applied_str_date, applied_end_date, event_str_date, event_end_date, time_segment, apply_date, status, is_leader ) values
( #{entry.campaignId}, #{entry.userNo}, #{entry.userId}, #{entry.appliedStrDate}, #{entry.appliedEndDate}, #{entry.eventPeriodStr}, #{entry.eventPeriodEnd}, #{entry.timeSegment}, #{entry.applyDate}, '8', 'Y' )
mapper.select: SELECT c.campaign_Id, place_addr, campaign_title, company_ph, DATE_FORMAT(c.created_at, '%Y.%m.%d') created_at, type_code, (CASE WHEN type_code = '01' THEN '경호' WHEN type_code = '02' THEN '진행' WHEN type_code = '03' THEN '수행' ELSE '' END) as type_nm, applicants_Num, recruitment_Num, result_date, u.user_nm, c.app_period_str, c.app_period_end, c.event_Period_str, c.event_Period_End, u.phone_num leader_Phone FROM campaign c LEFT OUTER JOIN user u ON c.leader_code = u.id where c.is_deleted = 'N' AND c.is_active = 'N' order by campaign_Id desc
mapper.update: UPDATE user_campaign SET apply_date = #{newDate}, event_str_date = #{eventPeriodStr}, event_end_date = #{eventPeriodEnd}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE campaign_id = #{campaignId} AND apply_date = #{oldDate} AND is_deleted = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_campaign ( campaign_id, user_no, user_id, apply_date, event_str_date, event_end_date, status, is_leader, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted) SELECT campaign_id, user_No, user_id, #{targetDate}, -- 새로 생성될 날짜 #{newStrDate}, #{newEndDate}, #{status}, -- 상태는 매개변수로 전달받음 (예: '0' 또는 '8') #{isLeader}, -- 리더 여부도 매개변수로 전달받음 (예: 'Y' 또는 'N') now(), now(), 'N' FROM user_campaign WHERE campaign_id = #{campaignId} AND apply_date = #{sourceDate} -- 복사 대상이 되는 원본 날짜 AND is_deleted = 'N' Limit 1
